name: Pearhead Dadlife/Fuel Gauge Ceramic Mug drinkware - White 16oz
description: Pearhead's #dadlife mug is the perfect gift for Dad! This white, ceramic mug is printed with modern details on both sides. "#dadlife" is printed in black on one side, and an empty fuel gauge decal is printed on the other side. This mug has a large handle to easily hold. Medium sized mug will carry all of dad's coffee. It fits 2 cups or 16 fluid ounces. Microwave and dishwasher safe.  Pearhead's #dadlife mug shows Dad how cool and fun he is. Product dimensions: 5.25" W x 4.5" H x 3.75" D
